# SCNPhysicsFieldScope.insideExtent

**Case**

The field’s effect applies only to objects within the region of space defined by its position and extent.

## Declaration

```swift
case insideExtent
```

## Constants

- **SCNPhysicsFieldScope.outsideExtent**: The field’s effect applies only to objects outside the region of space defined by its position and extent.
